notes:
mạnh = strong; having a lot of physical power or force.  

It describes people, body parts, weather, sounds, flavors, even personality. You can use it for physical strength (cơ thể mạnh), force (gió mạnh), or intensity (cà phê mạnh, mùi mạnh).  

It comes after the noun and works like other adjectives: can add rất, quá, khá, hơn to change degree.  

Close words: khỏe (healthy/physically well) — someone can khỏe but not very mạnh.  
Opposite: yếu (weak).
exampleSentences: Anh ấy rất mạnh nên có thể mang hai cái vali cùng lúc.
Sau khi tập thể dục đều đặn, em cảm thấy cơ thể mình khỏe và mạnh hơn.
Gió ngoài biển hôm nay rất mạnh, chúng ta nên cẩn thận.

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ trong công việc.

translation.en: She is very strong in her work.

definitions.es: Tener gran poder o fuerza física.
definitions.en: Having great physical power or strength.
definitions.vi: Có sức mạnh hoặc sức lực lớn.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is very strong so he can carry two suitcases at the same time.
After exercising regularly, I feel my body is healthier and strong.
The wind at the sea is very strong today, we should be careful.

It describes people, body parts, weather, sounds, flavors, even personality. You can use it for physical strength (cơ thể mạnh), force (gió mạnh), or intensity (cà phê mạnh, mùi mạnh).  

It comes after the noun and works like other adjectives: can add *rất, quá, khá, hơn* to change degree.  

Close words: **khỏe** (healthy/physically well) — someone can *khỏe* but not very *mạnh*.  
Opposite: **yếu** (weak).

content.sentence: Anh ấy rất ___ trong thể thao.

translation.en: He is very strong in sports.
